stemHtml: NAVSTAR-GPS and GLONASS are interoperable. What does this mean about the two systems?

options.a: Both can be used simultaneously to give more accurate location.
options.b: When combined, they can provide a 3 dimensional position, which is otherwise only 2 dimensional.
options.c: GPS NAVSTAR and GLONASS are complimentary. One covers North America and the other covers Europe.
options.d: They allow the usage of each other's satellites.
